title: Chai's Build Tools
description: A set of tools that are useful for building; a wrench to rotate blocks, a trowel to place random blocks, and a cloud bucket to place blocks in the air
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/R0ptx36.png)

## About

Chai's Build Tools adds a set of tools that are useful for building in both survival and creative. The recipes were thoughtfully designed to be introduced with each new metal you obtain (copper -> iron -> gold) and give another crafting use for the ingredients.

## Wrench

The wrench can rotate all kinds of blocks, including torches and ladders onto neighboring supported walls.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/swsFw76C/images/3759034032f725359afecdf1f43dc0faa162bc39.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/N27HfLt.gif)

## Trowel

The trowel will place random blocks from your hotbar.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/swsFw76C/images/de145f7a3203db909bc736110222f6102bdc7812.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/qpXT7Uw.gif)

## Cloud Bucket

The cloud bucket can place unlimited cloud blocks that disperse after 4 seconds. It can also place these cloud blocks in mid-air too.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/swsFw76C/images/66a568de531108a5b0b3666792ff5e4b762dddaa.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/flAwtx4.gif)
